narrative:
Beavercreek 013 (precinct in Greene County) has 692 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.4 percentage points.
